title: alternanthera stellata var. glabrata
intro: Alternanthera stellata var. glabrata is a variety of the Alternanthera stellata plant, commonly known as the 'false dwarf copperleaf' or 'false copperleaf', and is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alternanthera stellata var. glabrata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
